name: windags-mcp
description: WinDAGs MCP server — local cascade (lexical + semantic + RRF + cross-encoder + per-user attribution k-NN) over the bundled catalog plus your own SKILL.md files. Zero API keys.

scripts.test: node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/telemetry-smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/user-skills-smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/mcp-handshake-test.mjs
scripts.postinstall: echo 'WinDAGs MCP server ready. Run: claude mcp add windags -- windags-mcp'
